sourceInterpretation: source internal measures are replayed through current reconstructMusicalEvents before classification/simulation
caseDefinition: same-clef note events in the same measure where a 2- or 3-note anchor chord is followed one division later by a single note, the follower is vertically inside/repeating/above the anchor stack, and the x gap exceeds the current split-chord threshold

decision.reason: No simulated discriminator improved chord grouping meaningfully while preserving onset and pitch. Dense/x-gap-only merges worsened chord grouping; broad vertical-stack merges worsened chord and sometimes pitch/duration.
